summary: A low-angle view of old bare tree trunks rising from a wildflower meadow under a cloudy sky.
detailed_description: The image shows a large gnarled, leafless tree trunk dominating the left-center foreground, with smaller bare trunks receding through the midground. Dense green grasses and purple and yellow wildflowers fill the lower half of the frame, while a broad overcast sky occupies most of the upper background. A small distant structure is barely visible near the far right edge, but the scene is primarily a quiet open meadow or rural grove.

subjects.description: A large old, bare, heavily textured tree trunk with thin branches is the dominant subject.

spatial.notes: The trunk rises from the meadow and extends into the top edge.

framing_risks.description: The main tree branches reach the top edge and could be clipped in reframing.
The bottom-left watermark may be cut, preserved, or distorted depending on downstream processing.
The distant right-edge structure is tiny and easy to misread or crop out.

generation_risks.description: Thin bare branches and dense grasses may shimmer or deform in generated motion.
The gnarled bark has complex knots and cavities that may be simplified.
The visible watermark may not remain readable after image-to-video generation.
